creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This is London’s #1-rated bakery on Tripadvisor serving authentic Italian Bombolone 🍩

@bombolone.london specialises in soft, fluffy Italian doughnuts filled with indulgent creams, the perfect sweet stop in central London.

📍21 Whitcomb St., London WC2H 7HA

#bombolone #londonfoodie #londondesserts #leicestersquare

transcription.text: This place in London is the only place that's entirely dedicated to bomboloni, which is an Italian fried doughnut. They are freshly baked every single morning and filled with incredible fillings. They are super soft and fluffy and right now you have to visit them for their spring selection, delicious as a dessert or paired with a coffee. You can actually also get sandwiches here, where the bread is the doughnut sliced in half, which just works. They do these mini dessert pots as well, including a chia seed pudding and a tiramisu. The interiors are also so cute and you'll just want to take away a box. Find all the details in the caption and share this with someone who would love to go.
